title: HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM - 211info
text: ALBANY AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Habitat for Humanity provides an opportunity for families to build and buy their own homes. The houses are sold at no profit to homeowner families. Confidential Address Eligibility: Families currently living in substandard housing who meet all of the following requirements: -Meet income guidelines -Can commit to 500 hours of sweat equity in construction -Are United States citizens or permanent residents and residents of the Greater Albany School District for the past year -Have not have owned a home in the past 3 years -Have the ability to pay a mortgage payment (steady income and decent credit history, able to manage current debt) Substandard housing may include poor heating or wiring, a leaky roof, mold, not having enough space for your family, or paying 50% or more of your income towards housing. Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon Email (541) 967-4030 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 967-4030 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Households are responsible for a closing fee of up to $1000. 0% down payment for closing costs and a 0%-interest mortgage (0% APR). Mortgage lengths vary depending on income; Habitat adjusts the length of the mortgage so that the monthly mortgage payment (which includes taxes, insurance, and condo fees, if applicable) is no more than 30% of the homeowner’s gross monthly income at the time of sale. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: Linn County Services: Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Subsidized Home Acquisition Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME REPAIR If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
